name: agent-bundle
postAttachCommand:
echo '
========================================
  Welcome to agent-bundle!
========================================

  1. Set your API key:

     export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-or-...

  2. Try a demo:

     cd demo/code-formatter/k8s
     cat agent-bundle.yaml    # see the agent definition
     ./setup.sh               # start the dev server

  3. Open the WebUI at http://localhost:3000

  More demos: ls demo/
  Docs: https://agent-bundle.com
========================================
'
